creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 158124
mail/roundube Makefile and distinfo update for 1.1.2

Roundcube has released version 1.1.2, carrying some security fixes as well:

https://roundcube.net/news/2015/06/05/updates-1.1.2-and-1.0.6-released/

With the attached patch (against revision 390719) the port builds, but I haven't yet tested updating in production.
